info.description: Cloud License Platform — multi-tenant SaaS licensing and entitlement management.
info.title: CLP API

post.description: Sets status to "expired" for all subscriptions whose end_date is in the past and are not already expired or cancelled.

delete.description: Removes a cloud provider account association by its UUID.

get.description: Returns a deployment by UUID.

delete.description: Permanently removes a deployment by UUID.

get.description: Returns an endpoint/agent by UUID.

delete.description: Permanently removes an endpoint/agent by UUID.

post.description: Updates the last_seen timestamp for the endpoint to now.

patch.description: Sets the endpoint status (active, inactive, deleted).

get.description: Returns entitlement events filtered by event type, newest first.

post.description: Records an entitlement lifecycle event with arbitrary metadata.
Returns events whose metadata contains the provided JSON fragment (JSONB containment query).

get.description: Returns the full feature catalog ordered by feature code.

post.description: Adds a new feature to the catalog.

get.description: Returns a feature by its unique feature code.

delete.description: Permanently removes a feature from the catalog by UUID.

get.description: Returns a subscription by UUID.

post.description: Sets the subscription status to cancelled.

get.description: Returns all entitlement events for the given subscription, newest first.
Returns the features and their enabled/limit state for the given subscription.

post.description: Upserts a feature entitlement for the given subscription (idempotent).
post.summary: Add or update a feature on a subscription

delete.description: Removes the feature entitlement for the given feature ID from the subscription.
delete.summary: Remove a feature from a subscription

patch.description: Sets the subscription status (trial, active, grace, past_due, cancelled, expired).

get.description: Returns a paginated list of tenants ordered by creation time descending.

post.description: Creates a new tenant. Status defaults to "active" if omitted.

get.description: Looks up a tenant using its external system reference identifier.
Returns a single tenant by UUID.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a tenant by UUID.

get.description: Returns all cloud provider account associations for the given tenant.
get.summary: List cloud account mappings for a tenant

post.description: Associates a cloud provider account ID with the given tenant.
post.summary: Add a cloud account mapping for a tenant

get.description: Returns all deployments belonging to the given tenant, newest first.

post.description: Registers a new cloud deployment (aws, azure, gcp, onprem) for the given tenant.
post.summary: Create a deployment for a tenant

get.description: Returns all endpoints/agents registered under the given tenant, newest first.

post.description: Registers a new agent/endpoint under the given tenant.
post.summary: Register an endpoint for a tenant

get.description: Returns the number of endpoints with status "active" for the given tenant.
get.summary: Count active endpoints for a tenant

get.description: Returns entitlement events for the given tenant, newest first, with pagination.

patch.description: Sets the tenant status (active, suspended, deleted).

get.description: Returns all subscriptions for the given tenant, newest first.

post.description: Creates a new subscription for the given tenant.
post.summary: Create a subscription for a tenant

get.description: Returns the most recent subscription in trial, active, or grace status.
get.summary: Get active subscription for a tenant

get.description: Returns daily usage metrics for the given tenant between from and to dates (inclusive), newest first.
get.summary: Get usage metrics for a date range

put.description: Creates or updates usage metrics for the given tenant and date (idempotent).
put.summary: Upsert daily usage metrics for a tenant

get.description: Returns usage metrics for the given tenant on the specified date (YYYY-MM-DD).
get.summary: Get usage metrics for a specific date
